requirement_topic.en: Energy Performance / MEPS — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Zambia energy-efficiency programme; ZS/IEC 62552)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效性能/MEPS——家用制冷器具（赞比亚能效计划；ZS/IEC 62552）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效性能/MEPS——家用製冷器具（尚比亞能效計畫；ZS/IEC 62552）

summary.en: Zambia has been advancing energy-efficiency programmes covering electrical appliances (including refrigerators), driven by national energy policy and supported by regional Southern African (SADC) harmonisation and international cooperation on minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and energy labelling. Where MEPS apply, household refrigerating appliances must meet a minimum energy-performance threshold and their energy consumption is measured against the Zambian Standard adoption of the international test method (ZS / IEC 62552 series — characteristics and test methods for household refrigerating appliances). The energy-performance dimension is assessed alongside ZABS conformity assessment for regulated products. Exporters should confirm the precise scope, in-force dates, MEPS levels, and any labelling format with ZABS and the relevant Zambian energy authority before relying on a specific threshold, as the programme is evolving. [Confirm current MEPS coverage and label format for refrigerators with ZABS before market placement.]
summary.zh: 赞比亚一直在推进涵盖电器（包括电冰箱）的能效计划，由国家能源政策推动，并得到南部非洲（SADC）区域协调及最低能效性能标准（MEPS）和能效标识国际合作的支持。在适用MEPS的情形下，家用制冷器具须达到最低能效门槛，其耗电量按赞比亚标准采纳的国际测试方法（ZS/IEC 62552系列——家用制冷器具特性与测试方法）测量。能效维度与受监管产品的ZABS合格评定一并评估。鉴于该计划仍在演进，出口商在依据具体门槛前，应向ZABS及相关赞比亚能源主管部门确认确切范围、生效日期、MEPS等级及任何标识格式。【投放市场前请向ZABS确认电冰箱当前MEPS覆盖范围及标识格式。】
summary.zht: 尚比亞一直在推進涵蓋電器（包括電冰箱）的能效計畫，由國家能源政策推動，並得到南部非洲（SADC）區域協調及最低能效性能標準（MEPS）和能效標識國際合作的支持。在適用MEPS的情形下，家用製冷器具須達到最低能效門檻，其耗電量按尚比亞標準採納的國際測試方法（ZS/IEC 62552系列——家用製冷器具特性與測試方法）測量。能效維度與受監管產品的ZABS合格評定一併評估。鑑於該計畫仍在演進，出口商在依據具體門檻前，應向ZABS及相關尚比亞能源主管部門確認確切範圍、生效日期、MEPS等級及任何標識格式。【投放市場前請向ZABS確認電冰箱當前MEPS覆蓋範圍及標識格式。】

standards_or_laws: ZS IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (Zambian adoption of IEC 62552 for energy measurement)
Zambia national energy-efficiency programme / MEPS for electrical appliances (advanced with SADC regional harmonisation and international cooperation)
ZABS conformity-assessment / import-inspection framework (energy performance assessed for regulated products)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), establishing grades (Grade 1 most efficient to Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits, with GB/T 8059-2016 as the aligned test-method standard (IEC 62552 series). The standard is mandatory (GB), enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label administered by NDRC. Because both China's test method (GB/T 8059 / IEC 62552) and Zambia's adopted method (ZS/IEC 62552) derive from IEC 62552, the underlying consumption measurement overlaps; however, the MEPS threshold and any Zambian label format differ from China's grade system and are not directly comparable.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效至5级最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值，测试方法标准为对应的GB/T 8059-2016（IEC 62552系列）。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由SAMR执行，中国能效标识由NDRC管理。由于中国测试方法（GB/T 8059/IEC 62552）与赞比亚采纳方法（ZS/IEC 62552）同源于IEC 62552，底层耗电量测量重叠；但MEPS门槛及任何赞比亚标识格式与中国等级体系不同，不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效至5級最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值，測試方法標準為對應的GB/T 8059-2016（IEC 62552系列）。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由SAMR執行，中國能效標識由NDRC管理。由於中國測試方法（GB/T 8059/IEC 62552）與尚比亞採納方法（ZS/IEC 62552）同源於IEC 62552，底層耗電量測量重疊；但MEPS門檻及任何尚比亞標識格式與中國等級體系不同，不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: The measurement basis overlaps because both countries adopt IEC 62552, but two gaps remain: (1) MEPS threshold — a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not by itself prove the unit meets the Zambian MEPS threshold; the consumption value must be evaluated against the Zambian MEPS level in force, which must be confirmed with ZABS as the programme is evolving; (2) Label/declaration — China's 1-to-5 grade China Energy Label does not serve as the Zambian energy declaration; if Zambia requires a specific energy label or declaration for refrigerators, it must be produced in the Zambian format (in English) using IEC 62552-based data. Test data measured to GB/T 8059 / IEC 62552 can support the Zambian filing, but the threshold comparison and any label conversion are the manufacturer's responsibility. [The exact MEPS level and whether comparative labelling is mandatory for refrigerators should be confirmed with ZABS before relying on Chinese grade data.]
gap.zh: 因两国均采纳IEC 62552，测量基准重叠，但仍存两项差距：（1）MEPS门槛——中国1级或2级评定本身不能证明机型达到赞比亚MEPS门槛；耗电量值须按现行赞比亚MEPS等级评估，而该等级须向ZABS确认，因计划仍在演进；（2）标识/声明——中国1至5级的中国能效标识不能充当赞比亚能效声明；若赞比亚对电冰箱要求特定能效标签或声明，须以赞比亚格式（英文）并使用基于IEC 62552的数据制作。依GB/T 8059/IEC 62552测得的数据可支持赞比亚申报，但门槛比对及任何标识转换由制造商负责。【电冰箱确切MEPS等级及比较性标识是否强制，应在依据中国等级数据前向ZABS确认。】
gap.zht: 因兩國均採納IEC 62552，測量基準重疊，但仍存兩項差距：（1）MEPS門檻——中國1級或2級評定本身不能證明機型達到尚比亞MEPS門檻；耗電量值須按現行尚比亞MEPS等級評估，而該等級須向ZABS確認，因計畫仍在演進；（2）標識/聲明——中國1至5級的中國能效標識不能充當尚比亞能效聲明；若尚比亞對電冰箱要求特定能效標籤或聲明，須以尚比亞格式（英文）並使用基於IEC 62552的數據製作。依GB/T 8059/IEC 62552測得的數據可支持尚比亞申報，但門檻比對及任何標識轉換由製造商負責。【電冰箱確切MEPS等級及比較性標識是否強制，應在依據中國等級數據前向ZABS確認。】

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / evolving — where Zambia's MEPS programme covers refrigerators, meeting the MEPS threshold (measured to ZS/IEC 62552) is mandatory and assessed within ZABS conformity assessment; exact in-force scope and label format must be confirmed with ZABS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy-efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zambia's appliance energy-efficiency / MEPS programme uses IEC 62552-based measurement, the same test basis as China's GB/T 8059, so consumption data is reusable; however, a Chinese energy grade does not prove compliance with the Zambian MEPS threshold, and the China Energy Label is not a Zambian energy declaration. Confirm the current MEPS level and any label format with ZABS before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 赞比亚器具能效/MEPS计划采用基于IEC 62552的测量，与中国GB/T 8059测试基准相同，故耗电量数据可复用；但中国能效等级不能证明符合赞比亚MEPS门槛，且中国能效标识不是赞比亚能效声明。投放市场前请向ZABS确认现行MEPS等级及任何标识格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚比亞器具能效/MEPS計畫採用基於IEC 62552的測量，與中國GB/T 8059測試基準相同，故耗電量數據可複用；但中國能效等級不能證明符合尚比亞MEPS門檻，且中國能效標識不是尚比亞能效聲明。投放市場前請向ZABS確認現行MEPS等級及任何標識格式。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Zambian Energy Label / Declaration (vs China Energy Label)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——赞比亚能效标签/声明（对比中国能效标识）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——尚比亞能效標籤/聲明（對比中國能效標識）

summary.en: As part of Zambia's appliance energy-efficiency programme, comparative energy labelling for major appliances (including refrigerators) is being developed and rolled out, supported by SADC regional harmonisation of appliance labels and international cooperation. Where an energy label is required, the supplier/importer must display the Zambian energy label showing the energy-performance class and measured annual energy consumption (kWh/annum), based on testing to the ZS adoption of the IEC 62552 series. The label must be presented in English at point of sale. Unlike the EU there is no EPREL-style mandatory central product-registration database that gates market entry; conformity is demonstrated through ZABS conformity assessment and, where applicable, the energy label/declaration. Exporters should confirm with ZABS whether comparative labelling is currently mandatory for refrigerators and the exact label artwork/scale required. [Confirm label mandatory status, scale, and format with ZABS before market placement.]
summary.zh: 作为赞比亚器具能效计划的一部分，针对主要电器（包括电冰箱）的比较性能效标识正在制定和推广，并得到SADC器具标识区域协调及国际合作支持。在要求能效标签的情形下，供应商/进口商须展示赞比亚能效标签，标注能效性能等级及实测年耗电量（千瓦时/年），依据赞比亚采纳的IEC 62552系列测试。标签须在销售点以英文呈现。与欧盟不同，赞比亚没有类似EPREL的强制中央产品注册数据库作为市场准入门槛；合规通过ZABS合格评定及（适用时）能效标签/声明证明。出口商应向ZABS确认比较性标识目前是否对电冰箱强制，以及所需的确切标签图样/等级体系。【投放市场前请向ZABS确认标签强制状态、等级体系及格式。】
summary.zht: 作為尚比亞器具能效計畫的一部分，針對主要電器（包括電冰箱）的比較性能效標識正在制定和推廣，並得到SADC器具標識區域協調及國際合作支持。在要求能效標籤的情形下，供應商/進口商須展示尚比亞能效標籤，標注能效性能等級及實測年耗電量（千瓦時/年），依據尚比亞採納的IEC 62552系列測試。標籤須在銷售點以英文呈現。與歐盟不同，尚比亞沒有類似EPREL的強制中央產品登記數據庫作為市場准入門檻；合規通過ZABS合格評定及（適用時）能效標籤/聲明證明。出口商應向ZABS確認比較性標識目前是否對電冰箱強制，以及所需的確切標籤圖樣/等級體系。【投放市場前請向ZABS確認標籤強制狀態、等級體系及格式。】

standards_or_laws: Zambia comparative energy-labelling programme for major appliances (developed with SADC harmonisation; in-force scope for refrigerators to be confirmed with ZABS)
ZS IEC 62552 series — measurement basis for declared annual energy consumption
ZABS conformity-assessment framework (energy label/declaration assessed for regulated products)

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision), displaying a 1-to-5 grade (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption, administered by CNIS under NDRC/SAMR. Manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing; there is no EPREL-style pre-registration database. The Chinese 1-to-5 grade label is structurally different from any Zambian comparative label and cannot serve as the Zambian energy declaration without conversion.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订版），展示1至5级（1级最高，5级最低门槛）及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级；无类似EPREL的预注册数据库。中国1至5级标签在结构上与任何赞比亚比较性标签不同，未经转换不能充当赞比亚能效声明。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂版），展示1至5級（1級最高，5級最低門檻）及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級；無類似EPREL的預登記數據庫。中國1至5級標籤在結構上與任何尚比亞比較性標籤不同，未經轉換不能充當尚比亞能效聲明。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: The China Energy Label cannot be reused directly: (1) Format/scale — if Zambia mandates a comparative energy label for refrigerators, it must follow the Zambian (or SADC-harmonised) format and scale, in English, not China's 1-to-5 grade artwork; (2) Underlying data — the declared annual energy consumption can be derived from existing IEC 62552-based test data (shared basis with GB/T 8059), so re-testing for the energy figure may be avoidable, but the class assignment must use the Zambian scale; (3) No central registration gate — unlike the EU EPREL, Zambia has no mandatory central pre-registration database that blocks market entry; the relevant gate is ZABS conformity assessment plus, where applicable, the label/declaration. The exact mandatory status of comparative labelling for refrigerators in Zambia is evolving and must be confirmed with ZABS. Where Zambia lacks a defined comparative-label scheme for a given product, plainly: no EU-style energy-label artwork is required, only the MEPS threshold and any declaration ZABS specifies.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识不能直接复用：（1）格式/等级体系——若赞比亚对电冰箱强制比较性能效标签，须采用赞比亚（或SADC协调）格式与等级体系，以英文呈现，而非中国1至5级图样；（2）底层数据——所声明的年耗电量可由现有基于IEC 62552的检测数据（与GB/T 8059同源）导出，故能效数值或可免于重新检测，但等级划分须采用赞比亚等级体系；（3）无中央注册门槛——与欧盟EPREL不同，赞比亚无强制中央预注册数据库阻断市场准入；相关门槛为ZABS合格评定加（适用时）标签/声明。赞比亚对电冰箱比较性标识的确切强制状态仍在演进，须向ZABS确认。若赞比亚对某产品缺乏既定比较标签方案，则明确而言：无须欧盟式能效标签图样，仅需MEPS门槛及ZABS规定的任何声明。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識不能直接複用：（1）格式/等級體系——若尚比亞對電冰箱強制比較性能效標籤，須採用尚比亞（或SADC協調）格式與等級體系，以英文呈現，而非中國1至5級圖樣；（2）底層數據——所聲明的年耗電量可由現有基於IEC 62552的檢測數據（與GB/T 8059同源）導出，故能效數值或可免於重新檢測，但等級劃分須採用尚比亞等級體系；（3）無中央登記門檻——與歐盟EPREL不同，尚比亞無強制中央預登記數據庫阻斷市場准入；相關門檻為ZABS合格評定加（適用時）標籤/聲明。尚比亞對電冰箱比較性標識的確切強制狀態仍在演進，須向ZABS確認。若尚比亞對某產品缺乏既定比較標籤方案，則明確而言：無須歐盟式能效標籤圖樣，僅需MEPS門檻及ZABS規定的任何聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / evolving — comparative energy labelling for refrigerators is being developed under Zambia's energy-efficiency programme; where mandatory, the Zambian label/declaration (IEC 62552-based) must be displayed in English; no EPREL-style central registration gate exists — confirm current status with ZABS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where Zambia requires a comparative energy label for refrigerators, it must use the Zambian/SADC-harmonised format in English, not the Chinese 1-to-5 China Energy Label; the declared consumption can reuse IEC 62552-based test data. Unlike the EU, there is no EPREL-style central registration gating market entry — the gate is ZABS conformity assessment. Confirm the current label mandatory status and format with ZABS before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在赞比亚对电冰箱要求比较性能效标签的情形下，须采用赞比亚/SADC协调格式并以英文呈现，而非中国1至5级的中国能效标识；所声明的耗电量可复用基于IEC 62552的检测数据。与欧盟不同，赞比亚无类似EPREL的中央注册作为市场准入门槛——门槛为ZABS合格评定。投放市场前请向ZABS确认现行标签强制状态及格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在尚比亞對電冰箱要求比較性能效標籤的情形下，須採用尚比亞/SADC協調格式並以英文呈現，而非中國1至5級的中國能效標識；所聲明的耗電量可複用基於IEC 62552的檢測數據。與歐盟不同，尚比亞無類似EPREL的中央登記作為市場准入門檻——門檻為ZABS合格評定。投放市場前請向ZABS確認現行標籤強制狀態及格式。
